## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Do '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Component | <!-- server / app / web --> |

Paste relevant server logs or flutter logs here.
